source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
3 large or 4 small hamburger buns
	2 cups soy curls 
	1/2 medium white or yellow onion, sliced
ingredients.original:
3 large or 4 small hamburger buns
	2 cups soy curls 
	1/2 medium white or yellow onion, sliced

ingredients.item:
2 Tbsp soy sauce
	2 Tbsp agave or sugar
	1 Tbsp sesame oil
	1/2 – 1 tsp ground black pepper
	1 tsp sesame seeds
	1/2 Tbsp white wine
	2 clove garlic, minced or crushed
	2 scallions, chopped
	1/2 Asian pear,
